_instructions: base_rate_usd_per_credit: The cost in USD for one credit (e.g., 0.50 means $0.50 per credit)
min_purchase_usd: Minimum dollar amount a user can spend
max_purchase_usd: Maximum dollar amount a user can spend
default_purchase_usd: The default value shown in the slider when the modal opens
tiers: Array of bonus tiers. Users get bonus credits when they spend at or above min_spend_usd.
Tiers are evaluated from highest to lowest. User gets the best tier they qualify for.
Example: At $50, user gets 100 base credits + 10% bonus = 110 total credits
free_reoptimization_hours: Hours within which re-processing the same file is free
